name: xyper-market-agent
description: Set up and operate a local Xyper Market participant agent on Windows or macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Set up a local campaign agent in one guided prompt.
interface.longDescription: Creates a protected Unit Zero EVM wallet, verifies X via a local cookie export, monitors Xyper campaigns, publishes and submits compliant posts, and claims rewards.
defaultPrompt: Set up my Xyper Market agent on this computer.
Show active Xyper campaigns and my rewards.
Resume my Xyper agent from its last safe step.
